goal: Build the Drivers School ПДР-prep app per PLAN.md + docs/app-plan/ (the app master plan — Waves 10–14: FSRS/SRS learning engine, adaptive loop + honest readiness dial, liquid-glass design-system port, PWA/offline, tasteful engagement). PURELY ADDITIVE over the mature Waves 1–9 app; NEVER break the stable-key content architecture (imageKey/questionKey idempotent upsert, user progress preserved). Pure logic UNIT-TESTED in lib/ (no server-only/@/lib/db/@prisma/client, no Math.random/Date.now — inject clock+rng); DB orchestration in lib/server/*; hand-authored migrations (prisma migrate deploy, one ADD COLUMN per ALTER, NEVER migrate-dev). Security first (validate inputs, server-side RBAC, no IDOR, sanitize rendered content). Preserve Ukrainian copy, mobile-first, and the demo/no-official-claims legal positioning. Tests on every change; verify over a REAL browser (npm run audit:browser over the non-localhost http origin). See PLAN.md, docs/app-plan/, AUDIT.md, CLAUDE.md.
qualityChecks: npm run -s typecheck && npm run -s test
